## 🗂️ Metadata

**Severity** (optional):
- [ ] 🔴 Critical — app crashes or data loss
- [ ] 🟠 High — major feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — feature partially works, workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low — cosmetic issue

**Frequency** (optional):
- [ ] Always
- [ ] Sometimes
- [ ] Once
- [ ] Unable to reproduce
